user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new FMLA rejection reason, so that approvers can select a standard reason when rejecting FMLA requests.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Rejection Reasons screen; When I click Add new rejection reason and enter FMLA type and reason; Then the rejection reason is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view rejection reasons by FMLA type and reason, so that I can review the configured rejection reasons.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Rejection Reasons screen; When the list loads; Then I see the FMLA type(s) and Reason columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the rejection reasons list, so that I see the latest entries.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Rejection Reasons screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current reasons

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see an empty state when no rejection reasons exist, so that I know to configure them.
acceptance_criteria: Given no rejection reasons are configured; When the list loads; Then it shows "No records to display"
